1. kruñc ( Pāṇ. iii, 2, 59 ) cl. 1. P. kruñcati, ‘to curve or make crooked’ or ‘to be crooked, move crookedly’,  Dhātup. vii, 4 ;
‘to become small, shrink’, or ‘to make small, lessen’,  ib. ;
to go towards, approach,  Vop.
